diff.summary: Add explicit unreachable-affected-party fallback under Law 1 without weakening the rights floor

rationale: Operators currently conflate machine-owner approval with affected-party consent when parties are unreachable.
implementationGuidance: Update consent taxonomy examples; no seed hash change until normative text is amended and re-hashed.

migrationImpact.rollbackPlan: Remain on seed hash; mark proposal withdrawn or rolled_back
